author: codex
scope: Applied subagent-reviewed deterministic spreadsheet preview sidecars for 10 not-ready spreadsheet sources after a clean wave45 generated-output checkpoint, refreshed readiness, and started the reopened ready pool as detached wave46.

reviewed_by_subagent.confirmation: No edits, provider-backed commands, Chandra/vLLM/OCR touches.

mutation_mechanism: bun packages/cli/src/cli.ts source-prep-apply-preview <source_id> --run-id spreadsheet-backlog-20260623; writes raw/sources/<source_id>/text.txt and blocks.jsonl from reviewed data/source-prep sidecars

sources.hazard: Abbreviated sheet labels: Consold, Occp-Gr; preserve literals.
Large 4-sheet variance/subsidy workbook; preserve long labels, negative values, ACCRUAL/CASH split.

verification.repo_secret_scan_after_launch: rg for Pioneer key fragments returned no matches

readiness_after_apply.interpretation: The reopened 10-source pool came from batch020 and was launched as wave46.

ingest_started.command_template: PIONEER_API_KEY='<PIONEER_API_KEY>' MTA_MATERIALIZE_EVERY=100000 setsid -f bun packages/cli/src/cli.ts campaign ingest --wave 46 --id validation-2026-06 --size 10 --concurrency 10 --timeout-min 300 --profile pioneer-deepseek-flash
